# kSecTrustSettingsResult

**Global Variable**

A number indicating the effective trust setting for this usage constraints dictionary.

## Declaration

```swift
var kSecTrustSettingsResult: String { get }
```

## Discussion

The value is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFNumber] object containing an `SInt32` value.
